en_title: Laid-Off MindsEye Developers Plan Protest Outside Company Office Over 'All-Expenses-Paid Playtest Day'
cn_title: 被裁《心之眼》开发者将抗议「全包试玩日」
subtitle: 工会称约20人参加
opus_summary: 《心之眼》开发商Build a Rocket Boy被裁员工计划在苏格兰爱丁堡办公室外抗议，反对工作室在大规模裁员后为粉丝举办「全包试玩日」。IWGB预计约20人参加。

paragraphs.en: MindsEye developers who have lost their jobs will protest outside the studio’s office over what they have described as an all-expenses-paid playtest day.
paragraphs.cn: 失去工作的《心之眼》开发者将到工作室办公室外抗议，他们将该活动称为「全包试玩日」。

paragraphs.en: The IWGB Game Workers Union said the protest will take place outside Build a Rocket Boy’s Edinburgh office on Saturday, July 11, at 11am local time. The union alleged BARB will fly fans into the studio to try out new features for MindsEye this weekend.
paragraphs.cn: IWGB游戏工人工会表示，抗议将于7月11日周六当地时间上午11点在Build a Rocket Boy的苏格兰爱丁堡办公室外举行。工会称，BARB会在本周末安排粉丝飞抵工作室，试玩《心之眼》的新功能。

paragraphs.en: The union said it will protest the studio’s decision to fund the event after mass layoffs over the last year, and amid wider disputes over alleged invasive employee surveillance, union blacklisting, and handling of redundancies. IWGB expects around 20 people, including laid-off BARB workers and supporters. Current staff are not expected to join.
paragraphs.cn: 工会称，在过去一年发生大规模裁员后，工作室仍资助该活动，这正是抗议对象之一；双方还就涉嫌侵入式员工监控、工会黑名单和裁员处置等问题存在更广泛争议。IWGB预计约20人参加，包括被裁的BARB员工及其支持者，现职员工预计不会加入。

paragraphs.en: BARB said it was hosting a community event as part of its ongoing commitment to its game creation system Arcadia and its creators, and that direct feedback from creators experiencing new features first-hand was its most important input.
paragraphs.cn: BARB向IGN表示，此次社区活动是其持续投入游戏创作系统Arcadia及支持者的一部分，让创作者亲身体验新功能并提供直接反馈，是最重要的输入来源。

paragraphs.en: It is the latest development following the disastrous release of MindsEye. Last July, BARB issued at-risk-of-redundancy emails to its then roughly 300-strong UK workforce after the game flopped. The company later said it was heartbroken over player issues and promised patches for performance, glitches, and AI behavior bugs.
paragraphs.cn: 这是《心之眼》灾难性发售后最新的风波。去年7月，游戏失利后，BARB向当时约300名英国员工发出可能裁员通知。公司随后称对玩家遇到的问题感到心碎，并承诺推出补丁修复严重性能问题、故障和AI行为Bug。

paragraphs.en: The story-driven action adventure MindsEye was initially planned as part of Everywhere, the Roblox for adults creation platform led by former Grand Theft Auto design chief Leslie Benzies. BARB eventually focused on MindsEye, but the game has so far failed to do business for the company.
paragraphs.cn: 叙事型动作冒险游戏《心之眼》最初计划作为Everywhere的一部分。该平台被称为「成人版Roblox」，由前《GTA》设计主管Leslie Benzies领导。BARB最终将重心转向《心之眼》，但本作至今未能为公司带来商业成功。

paragraphs.en: Benzies told staff the studio would bounce back and relaunch MindsEye, blaming internal and external saboteurs. CEO Mark Gerhard said the studio had been investigating criminal activity around launch.
paragraphs.cn: Benzies曾告诉员工，工作室会东山再起并重新推出《心之眼》，并将困境归咎于内部和外部破坏者。CEO Mark Gerhard称，工作室一直在调查游戏上线前后的「犯罪活动」。

paragraphs.en: BARB eventually tried to relaunch the game with the Blacklisted update, but it failed to move the needle. Console player numbers are unavailable, while MindsEye’s 24-hour Steam peak was just 48.
paragraphs.cn: BARB最终尝试借「Blacklisted」更新重新推出本作，但未能扭转局面。主机玩家数据尚未公开，而《心之眼》在Steam的24小时同时在线峰值仅为48人。

paragraphs.en: Take-Two boss Strauss Zelnick said making hits gets harder as entertainment industries mature, though Rockstar remains able to make massive hits. He said extraordinary creative people, rather than technology, would change the game.
paragraphs.cn: Rockstar母公司Take-Two负责人施特劳斯·泽尔尼克在5月表示，随着娱乐行业成熟，打造爆款越来越难，但Rockstar仍能做出巨大成功的作品。他认为，改变行业的将是非凡的创意人才，而不是技术本身。
